2606.23525.title: Self-Compacting Language Model Agents
2606.23525.paper_summary: Long agent traces composed of chains of thought and tool calls accumulate stale content that anchor subsequent generations, and eventually outgrow the context window. Existing scaffolds mitigate it with fixed-interval compaction triggered at a token threshold. Such triggers pay no heed to trajectory structure, risking discard of partial results mid-derivation or mid-search. We propose SelfCompact, a scaffold that allows the model itself to decide when and how to compact. Specifically, it pairs two inference-time elements: (i) a compaction tool the model invokes to summarize the accumulated context, and (ii) a lightweight rubric specifying when to fire (a sub-task has resolved, or the trajectory is converging) and when to suppress (mid-derivation, or when stuck). Both are needed. The tool alone is unevenly used across open-weight models, often invoked at unhelpful moments or not at all; the rubric alone cannot act. Together, they elicit effective adaptive compaction without any fine-tuning or external supervision. We present empirical results on six benchmarks (competitive math and agentic search) and seven models. Our results show that SelfCompact matches or exceeds fixed-interval summarization at a fraction of the token cost, improving over a no-summarization baseline by up to 18.1 points on math and 5-9 points on agentic search at 30-70% lower per-question cost. Our results expose a meta-cognitive gap: although unprompted models cannot reliably tell when their own context is rotting, a lightweight rubric closes this gap, reframing when to compact as a capability that scaffolds can supply without training.
2606.23525.paper_summary_zh: 長期的代理痕跡由思考鏈和工具調用組成，累積了過時的內容，這些內容固定了後續世代，最終超出了上下文窗口。現有的支架通過在令牌閾值觸發的固定間隔壓縮來減輕這一問題。這些觸發器對軌跡結構不予理會，冒著在推導或搜索過程中丟棄部分結果的風險。我們提出了SelfCompact，一種讓模型自己決定何時以及如何進行壓縮的支架。具體而言，它結合了兩個推理時的元素：(i) 模型調用的壓縮工具，用於總結累積的上下文，以及 (ii) 一個輕量級的標準，指定何時觸發（子任務已解決，或軌跡正在收斂）以及何時抑制（推導過程中，或當遇到困境時）。這兩者都是必需的。僅有工具在開放權重模型中使用不均，通常在不有幫助的時刻被調用，或根本不被調用；僅有標準則無法行動。這兩者結合起來，能夠在不進行微調或外部監督的情況下引發有效的自適應壓縮。我們在六個基準（競爭數學和代理搜索）和七個模型上展示了實證結果。我們的結果顯示，SelfCompact 在令牌成本的很小一部分下，達到或超過固定間隔摘要，在數學上提高了最多 18.1 分，在代理搜索上提高了 5-9 分，且每個問題的成本降低了 30-70%。我們的結果揭示了一個元認知差距：儘管未提示的模型無法可靠地判斷自己的上下文何時腐爛，但輕量級標準填補了這一差距，將何時進行壓縮重新框架為支架可以在不訓練的情況下提供的能力。
2606.23525.author: Tianjian Li et.al.
2606.23525.authors: Tianjian Li, Jingyu Zhang, William Jurayj, Xi Wang, Chuanyang Jin, Mehrdad Farajtabar, Eric Nalisnick, Daniel Khashabi
